text: The dim lighting and glass walls evoke a sense of isolation and anticipation within me. I am surrounded by the cold order of modern architecture, its clean lines both comforting and alienating. Entering the next space, vibrant colors and informative displays beckon me—there is an air of innovation and curiosity. Here, I feel like a wanderer on the edge of discovery, both out of place and compelled to learn, my mind dancing between introspection and the promise of new ideas.
